avatar.container: width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(245,101,101,0.2); border: 3px solid #F56565;

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #DD6B20; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-top: 2px solid #F56565; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #DD6B20; background: rgba(221,107,32,0.1); padding: 0 4px; font-weight: 600;

list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #4A5568; line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 500;

code.block: background: #FFF5F5; padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #E53E3E; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 2px solid #FEB2B2;
code.inline: background: #FFF5F5; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; color: #E53E3E; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; border: 1px solid #FEB2B2;

styles.quote: border-left: 4px solid #E53E3E; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #C53030; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(245,101,101,0.05); border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(245,101,101,0.15); border: 2px solid #FEB2B2;
styles.link: color: #E53E3E; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(245,101,101,0.4); transition: all 0.2s ease; font-weight: 600;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid #FEB2B2;

styles.hr: border: none; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F56565, #ECC94B, #48BB78); margin: 28px 0; border-radius: 2px;
